name: Noise Grain
description: Canvas-based film grain overlay with optional mouse clear-radius, animated or static, mono or color noise.
accessibility_notes: overlay only — does not obscure content at default intensity
needs reduced-motion fallback for animated mode

animated.description: Whether grain regenerates every frame or is static

clearRadius.description: Radius in px around cursor where grain fades out

className.description: CSS class for the canvas element

use_cases: film grain texture overlay on photos
conflicts: animated mode is CPU-heavy at high resolutions — createImageData per frame
usage_tip: Good for film grain or retro aesthetic overlay; pairs well with dark themes.
